name: Supermaven
pricing_notes: Free tier (basic); Pro $10/mo for full context window; unlimited completions

auth.notes: Auth token from supermaven.com account; editor plugins handle authentication

performance.notes: Industry-leading completion speed due to 1M token context window and efficient inference; sub-100ms typical

agent_readiness.notes: AI code completion with industry-leading 1M token context window. VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim plugins. Differentiated by speed and context size vs Copilot. No public API — editor plugin only. Limited agentic use cases; primarily human-in-loop IDE completion.

gotchas: No public REST API — editor plugin only, not programmatically accessible
Limited documentation for integration beyond IDE plugins
Smaller user base than GitHub Copilot — less community support
Agentic use requires running editor plugins, not suitable for headless agents
best_when: Developers wanting fastest code completion with largest context window
Teams that find GitHub Copilot too slow or limited context
Neovim/non-VS Code developers wanting fast AI completion
avoid_when: Building agentic pipelines that need programmatic API access
Need enterprise SSO or advanced team management
summary: Supermaven is an AI code completion tool differentiated by its 1M token context window and industry-leading speed (sub-100ms completions). Available as VS Code, JetBrains, and Neovim plugins. No public REST API — purely editor-plugin based, making it unsuitable for agentic pipelines. Best for developers wanting faster/smarter completions than GitHub Copilot at lower cost.
